suite_path_consumption.rationale: Narrow schema/fixture carrier PR with JSON Schema files and no persistence, admission runtime, API behavior, generated consumers, or cross-repo integration.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Review and PR Ready consume schema files, fixtures, package self-check, README command documentation, GH-98 carrier, local build/typecheck/test/lint output, PR metadata readback, and hosted checks.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to broader suite artifacts when full JSON Schema validation, Run Record persistence, API submit/query behavior, admission execution, generated types, CLI/MCP/SDK/App-facing API, Harbor/Lode consumption, or true-write guardrails are added.

integration_evidence.summary: Defines task intent, Run Record, result envelope, and evidence ref JSON Schema carriers with owner/status/compatibility metadata.
Provides representative fixture instances for read-only submit, admission failure Run Record, successful result envelope, and redacted evidence ref.
Loads schema and fixture files and asserts schema metadata plus fixture/schema version bindings without adding runtime dependencies.
Maps GH-98 as the primary Work Item and GH-94 as parent FR evidence without claiming FR completion.

commands.note: Initial run blocked on stale GH-97 bootstrap locator truth; `.loom/bootstrap/init-result.json` fact-chain entry points were synchronized to GH-98 and rerun passed.
Initial run blocked on missing Work Item `ownership_constraints`; GH-98 scope wording was updated with explicit ownership and rerun passed.

validation.recheck_condition: Rerun local validation, Loom suite/fact-chain/build flow, PR metadata readback, and hosted checks after every push.
